messages.content:
```latex
Empirically, training time per 1K RL steps differs by \textbf{<1 minute} with vs.\ without computing \textit{rv}, indicating negligible overhead.
```

If you want to avoid the “vs.” entirely:

```latex
Empirically, training time per 1K RL steps differs by \textbf{<1 minute} when computing \textit{rv} versus not, indicating negligible overhead.
```

在 LaTeX 里如果你写成 `\textbf{<1 minute}` 一般是可以的；但有时会因为字体/宏包导致显示异常。用数学模式最稳：

```latex
Empirically, training time per 1K RL steps differs by \textbf{$<1$ minute} with vs.\ without computing \textit{rv}, indicating negligible overhead.
```

或写成不等式更清晰：

```latex
Empirically, training time per 1K RL steps differs by \textbf{$< 1$ minute} with vs.\ without computing \textit{rv}.
```

*   What is the model used to generate the cold-start dataset?  
    
*   我们是用未训练的Qwen2.5-VL-7B生成cold-start dataset，并过滤掉不符合要求的样本。详细构造VKnowQA的细节可以参照Appendix D.2  
      
    
*

*   What model is used to generate the cold-start dataset?  
    *   We use the untrained Qwen2.5-VL-7B to generate the cold-start dataset and filter out samples that do not meet our criteria. Details of the VKnowQA construction are provided in Appendix D.2.
In Table~5, we additionally include Qwen2.5-7B as a baseline to highlight the benefit of our method, which is not the default setting of VideoKnow+. 简短，直接说与xx对比来highlight
In Table~5, we additionally include Qwen2.5-7B as a baseline and compare against it to highlight the benefit of our method (not a default setting of VideoKnow+).
In Table~5, we compare against Qwen2.5-7B to highlight our gains (not a default VideoKnow+ setting).

In VideoKnow+, the visual knowledge reward $r_v$ is verified by a \emph{frozen} Qwen2.5-VL-7B.
In Table~5, we compare against other verifier such as Qwen2.5-7B to highlight the benefit of our method.

In VideoKnow+, the visual knowledge reward $r_v$ is verified by a \emph{frozen} Qwen2.5-VL-7B. In Table~5, we also compare with an alternative verifier (Qwen2.5-7B) to highlight the benefit of our method.
In VideoKnow+, the visual knowledge reward $r_v$ is verified by a \emph{frozen} Qwen2.5-VL-7B. In Table~5, we also compare with an alternative verifier (Qwen2.5-7B) to demonstrate our superiority.
